title: Optical System Repair — Corghi EM7070
description: Repair of the optical measuring system of a Corghi EM7070 wheel balancing machine. The machine showed Error 28 related to the optical encoder system. The optical module, signal path, connectors and PCB were inspected and repaired, followed by functional testing.
image_alt: Corghi EM7070 optical sensor repair Error 28 wheel balancer AKEI Latvia
meta_description: Corghi EM7070 optical system repair for Error 28. Optical sensor and signal path diagnostics for wheel balancing equipment.
